title: Preschool Chinese Language Teacher @ West Coast (4-months contract)
description:
At The Schoolhouse by Busy Bees (formerly known as Pat's Schoolhouse), we’ve spent 35 years passionately shaping the future by nurturing young minds and building a solid foundation for countless children. With 14 thriving preschools and 2 nurturing infant care centres across Singapore, we’re more than just educators—we’re pioneers in child development.


Our innovative, inquiry-embedded, play-based approach and our rich multiple literacies curriculum empower children to connect deeply with culture, society, the environment, and technology. As a teacher with us, you won’t just be teaching—you’ll be inspiring and equipping the next generation with the critical skills they need to excel in a rapidly evolving world. You’ll be instrumental in cultivating essential qualities like collaboration, creativity, critical thinking, and empathy, ensuring that our students are not just prepared for the future but are ready to lead it.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Provide daily routine care and ensure a safe, fun environment for learning and play.
  • Plan and execute an inquiry-based curriculum tailored to children's developmental needs.
  • Develop and maintain strong partnerships with parents and families.
  • Prepare and manage children's portfolios.
  • Adhere to health, safety, nutritional, and hygiene standards.
  • Support the social, emotional, and confidence-building growth of children.
  • Promote core early childhood education values through events and activities.
  • Foster teamwork and maintain positive relationships with colleagues.
  • Participate in ongoing professional development and reflective practices.
  • Engage in centre initiatives, community projects, and collaborative efforts.

Qualifications:

  • Diploma in Early Childhood Care and Education-T (DECCE-T)
  • Certified by ECDA.
  • Minimum of 1 year of relevant experience.
  • Strong understanding of the developmental needs of young children (birth to age 6).
  • Effective classroom management and documentation skills.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Ability to manage stress and stay organized.
  • Passionate about teaching and nurturing young children.

Join us in making a lasting impact—be part of a team that’s dedicated to empowering children to thrive in tomorrow’s world!

postedCompany.description:
Join a legacy of excellence at The Schoolhouse by Busy Bees, where we have spent over 35 years nurturing young minds and laying strong foundations for countless children. With numerous preschools and  infant care centers across Singapore, we are leaders in early childhood education.

Our unique curriculum, rooted in an inquiry-embedded, play-based approach, enriches children's understanding of culture, society, the environment, and technology. This prepares them to navigate an ever-changing world with confidence.

We are looking for passionate educators who want to empower the next generation with future-ready skills like collaboration, creativity, critical thinking, and empathy. If you're dedicated to making a difference in the lives of children and want to be part of a team that thrives on innovation and excellence, we would love to hear from you.
postedCompany.name: PAT'S SCHOOLHOUSE PTE. LTD.
